title: Enforce Team monetary-cost, time and quality efficiency controller
acceptance: Production/default promotion requires fully-loaded cost ratio `<= 0.80`, wall-clock ratio `<= 0.75`, quality parity and no increase in repair/residue versus the paired single-Agent baseline.
Preferred routing requires cost `<= 0.75` and time `<= 0.65`; dual `<= 0.50` is recorded as a breakthrough target rather than the universal minimum.
Token ratio remains mandatory diagnostic telemetry with reason codes for context inflation, cache misses and retries, but is not a cross-model cash-cost proxy.
Projected or actual stop-loss failure automatically collapses roles, chooses a cheaper qualified model, shrinks team size or disables Team for the workload class.
Missing or stale price/usage evidence prevents promotion and allows only a bounded experiment.

Production/default comparisons group samples by TeamRosterFingerprint; changed model mix, role collapse, ContextManifest, prompt-cache policy, fan-out cap, quota probe or catalog version starts a new comparison cohort.
Bounded fan-out is enforced at runtime; quota/rate-limit failures, queue wait inflation or spending-ceiling risk trigger scale-down before more workers are launched.
The controller records bottleneck cause and optimization backlog target, not just the downgrade.
outOfScope: Unrelated refactors outside the declared scope.
rollbackNotes: Disable the new lane and keep the previous canonical behavior.
